title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Gerritsen Beach, Brooklyn | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Gerritsen Beach, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: Gerritsen Beach's waterfront homes and older residential structures can attract bats seeking sheltered roosting sites in attics, eaves, and chimneys. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout this tight-knit Brooklyn neighborhood, ensuring your property is bat-free and protected against future infestations. Our humane, effective methods comply with all local wildlife regulations while safeguarding your family's health.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of specialized bat control experience to Gerritsen Beach, with technicians trained in humane exclusion techniques and New York wildlife laws. We offer same-day emergency response, thorough attic inspections, complete exclusion work, and preventative solutions tailored to the unique architecture of Gerritsen Beach homes.
localContext: Gerritsen Beach's coastal location and mix of bungalow-style homes, raised houses, and properties near Marine Park create ideal bat entry points through weathered soffits, roof gaps, and ventilation systems. The neighborhood's proximity to Gerritsen Creek and Jamaica Bay provides ample insect food sources that attract bat populations to nearby residential areas year-round.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Gerritsen Beach?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Gerritsen Beach typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the colony size, entry point locations, and the extent of exclusion work needed. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Brooklyn, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bats are protected wildlife in New York, so removal must be done humanely using exclusion methods rather than extermination. Best Pest Control NYC follows all state and local regulations, using one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not re-enter, typically performed outside of maternity season (June-August).

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Gerritsen Beach home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds in walls or attics at dusk and dawn, droppings (guano) that resemble mouse droppings but crumble to dust, brown staining near entry points, and seeing bats enter or exit your home at sunset. You may also notice a strong ammonia-like odor from accumulated guano.

faqs.question: How long does the bat exclusion process take?
faqs.answer: The complete bat exclusion process typically takes 2-4 weeks. After the initial inspection and sealing of secondary entry points, one-way exclusion devices remain in place for 3-7 days to ensure all bats have exited. We then return to seal primary exits, remove contaminated insulation if needed, and sanitize affected areas.
